ops.title: athome R3 accounting hardening landed: run-UUID artifact identity + exactly-once settle
ops.body:
Final round-3 fix pass on the athome accounting lane, six commits on top of tvqvmpyq (workers reap bound), tip vzzntpnv@- (chore(workers): killpg logging). Not pushed.

1. Run-UUID threading (nwwzpzyw): Driver.pending_run() names the registered detached run whose spend is captured but unsettled; the loop stamps it onto journal row resources ("run" key, resources widened to dict[str, float | str]) and retry/wall_cancel sidecar events. procs.scan cross-checks a dead non-terminal record against those artifacts before latching (spend_recorded): artifact found -> finalize "accounted" quietly; none -> latch as before. Closes the journal.append/record_infra_event -> settle() kill window false latch.
2. Zero-cost recovered envelope (qtqttpvk): cancel/finally record conditions gained `or driver.pending_run() is not None` — terminal implies an artifact even at 0.0 cost.
3. Exactly-once (knxvplzp): recorded=True now flips immediately after the durable accounting write, BEFORE settle; settle runs through settle_spend() (retry idempotent settle once, then AccountingIntegrityError -> latch). The finally can no longer re-record on a settle failure.
4. reason/detail split (vtwmyouz): latch + ledger failure rows keep reason = exception type name (harness-authored); safe_describe(exc) moved to operator-only detail (latch "detail" / ledger extra["detail"]). ProposerContext.failures/prompts read reason only; hostile str(exc) proven absent from proposer prompts. ProposalViolation REJECTED reasons stay verbatim (harness-authored refusal that feeds reproposal prompts by design); loop.py journal.sink.path in the journal-append abort reason left per orchestrator rejection.
5. Latch-write failure (kvkvkprx): a failed initial latch atomic_write skips enrichment entirely (renderer never runs without a durable latch), logs via logger.error + safe_describe — NOT logger.exception, whose diagnose/backtrace reprs caller locals including the hostile exception (new A3.12 sub-finding discovered by the injection test).
6. workers.reap (tkvntplv): logging only — warning carries killpg exc + errno; debug line when killpg failed but wait succeeded.

Full suite green (uv run pytest), ruff format+check clean. Any Driver implementation must now provide pending_run() -> str | None.
